_meta.description: Fallback language for missing evidence and scope issues.

en.missingEvidence: I cannot answer that from current document evidence.
en.wrongDoc: I found a related document, but not the one you selected.

pt.missingEvidence: Nao consigo responder com base nas evidencias disponiveis.
pt.wrongDoc: Encontrei um documento relacionado, mas nao o selecionado.
